name: MICA WELL - Indoor Air Quality Sensor
description: MICA WELL is the most comprehensive indoor air quality monitoring device in the MICA range, featuring LoRaWAN, Wi-Fi, NB-IoT/LTE-M and Sigfox connectivity and measuring temperature, relative humidity, CO₂, TVOC, PM1.0, PM2.5, PM4.0, PM10, formaldehyde, ozone, NO₂ and CO, combined with thermohygrometric comfort, ventilation efficiency, resistance to mold growth, virus spread resistance and indoor air quality indicators, with optional noise monitoring and full compatibility with Modbus and BACnet for professional BMS and certification-driven projects.
author: inBiot
